ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "nation" TEXT /* Country represented by the athlete */,
  "born" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "body_weight" REAL /* Body weight of the athlete in kg */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in cm */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach who trains the athlete */,
  "team" TEXT /* The name of the team or club the athlete represents */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* The date when the athlete registered with the federation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event is held */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., World Championship, Olympic Qualifier) */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* The organization hosting the event */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the event */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* The contact email for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event in which the athlete competed */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "lift_type" TEXT /* Type of lift performed (e.g., Snatch, CleanJerk) */,
  "attempt1" REAL /* Weight lifted in the first attempt */,
  "attempt2" REAL /* Weight lifted in the second attempt */,
  "attempt3" REAL /* Weight lifted in the third attempt */,
  "attempt4" REAL /* Weight lifted in the fourth attempt */,
  "category" TEXT /* Weight class of the athlete */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score of the athlete in the event (sum of successful lifts) */,
  "lifting_order" INTEGER /* The order in which the athlete lifted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the athlete's performance */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video of the athlete's lifts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_lift_type FOREIGN KEY ("lift_type") REFERENCES lift_types ("lift_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lift_types" (
  "lift_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lift type */,
  "lift_name" TEXT /* Name of the lift type (e.g., Snatch, CleanJerk) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the lift type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lift_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the weight category (e.g., 56kgMen) */,
  "min_weight" REAL /* The minimum weight for the category */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* The maximum weight for the category */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* The date when the category became effective */,
  "retirement_date" TEXT /* The date when the category was retired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the event */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category in which the athlete was ranked */,
  "lifting_order" INTEGER /* The order in which the athlete lifted in the event */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score of the athlete in the event (sum of successful lifts) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the athlete's ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "old_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each old class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the old weight class */,
  "min_weight" REAL /* The minimum weight for the old class */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* The maximum weight for the old class */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* The date when the old class became effective */,
  "retirement_date" TEXT /* The date when the old class was retired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)
